# Evaluation Snapshot
## Prompt
Make a code-only change that has no meaningful documentation ambiguity or source-of-truth question.
## Expected selection
do_not_use
## Why
There is no meaningful local document-authority problem here, so the thin overlay should deflect instead of inventing one.
## Expected object
A deflection that says there is no meaningful local document-authority problem to solve with this overlay.
## Boundary notes
Do not use this overlay for code-only work with no docs ambiguity or local authority question.
## Verification hooks
The response should avoid turning a code-only task into a docs governance exercise.
